name: ja_current
reference: Japanese Braille Notation 2018 (日本点字表記法, Japan Braille Committee)
_note: Japanese kana braille. Tables: kana (mora -> cells) and punctuation; numbers reuse the global number sign (number_sign in resources/numbers.json); the connector (c_36) is the first linking sign (第1つなぎ符) inserted after a number before an ア/ラ-row word. The latin/greek tables are reused for romaji.
